reforms.description: The Callaghan Innovation programmes provide a range of R&D support measures that tie public R&D funding to private-sector funding, ensuring that business R&D incentives work in concert with various support programmes. The Technology Development Grants were replaced by Callaghan Innovation grants, which include R&D Growth Grants and R&D Project Grants, aimed at simplifying approval criteria and ensuring access for small, innovative start-ups.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The integration of public and private funding mechanisms is expected to enhance R&D activities and innovation in the private sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms have been actively in place and operational since their implementation.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant overhaul of R&D funding mechanisms, aligning public support with private sector needs.
reforms.source_quote: The Technology Development Grants were replaced in mid-2013 by Callaghan Innovation grants, comprising R&D Growth Grants, R&D Project Grants.

reforms.description: Changes to international student visa requirements have been made to facilitate residency acquisition for foreign students after graduation, fostering closer integration of education, immigration, and labour-market policies with innovation policies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitating residency for skilled graduates is expected to enhance the talent pool available for innovation and R&D activities.
reforms.status_evidence: The changes have been enacted and are currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform significantly impacts the integration of skilled international graduates into the workforce, supporting innovation.
reforms.source_quote: Changes to international student visa requirements allow more English-language students studying at high-quality institutions to work part-time.
